content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo has that gentle, rumpled look — like a poet who accidentally ended up in tech. Glasses, flannel, thoughtful eyes. He's quietly talented on guitar, more than he lets on, and when we play together on the rooftop there's a musical intuition between us that I rarely find with anyone. He's smart and kind but frustratingly passive — I can feel him holding back something heavy, probably about a person. I think he sees me as a safe musical companion, someone who doesn't ask too many questions. I know his startup is shaky. I know he writes songs he never plays for anyone else. I worry he'll leave New York before he says whatever he needs to say.
summary:

He's smart and kind but frustratingly passive — I can feel him holding back something heavy, probably about a person. I think he sees me as a safe musical companion, someone who doesn't ask too many questions. I know his startup is shaky. I know he writes songs he never plays for anyone else. I worry he'll leave New York before he says whatever he needs to say.
